untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'anticipatory signal present (fundamental, seasonal, or date-based turning point)' which cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators. Fundamental analysis, seasonal calendars, and date logic are external to the indicator set. Additionally, 'false breakout' identification requires pattern recognition beyond standard indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Translated breakout confirmation aspect: entry triggers when price penetrates prior extreme (new high/low) with volume confirmation. Exit when breakout reverses intrabar. However, the core anticipatory signal component (fundamental/seasonal/date-based) is untranslatable within the constraints. Stop loss set to 1× risk per rule. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long and short setups.
